rationales.hook_strength: 'Sunlight does more than make vitamin D' is specific and contrarian enough to earn a pause, though the sub-copy overloads the cover with mechanism detail.
rationales.clarity: Each slide advances one idea cleanly; slide 5 slightly doubles up on mood and body clock but stays readable.
rationales.audience_fit: Busy 20–35s who walk to work or eat lunch outside can act on this immediately — no gym, no supplement, no friction.
rationales.novelty: Nitric-oxide-from-UVA is genuinely underreported in short-form health content, giving it a real knowledge-gap hook most carousels lack.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged ('may lower blood pressure,' 'may help'), voice is plain and non-hypey, and the CTA ties the walk directly to the Health Score with no AI-cringe.
rationales.predicted_performance: Strong save candidate — specific mechanism + actionable payoff + no cost to try; sharing potential moderate unless the audience skews health-nerd.
